ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND ( !ISNEW(), OR( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Approval_Status__c), 'Approved'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Approval_Status__c), 'Rejected'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Approval_Status__c), 'Bulk Approved'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Approval_Status__c), 'Auto Approved')),
NOT(ISBLANK(UE_Last_Updated__c)), NOT(IsChanged( Latest_Unit_Economics__c )), NOT(IsChanged( UE_Last_Updated__c )) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Record will up updated from UE upload.
